# Nugget Wallpaper

A multilingual landing page for importing live wallpapers to iPhone and iPad with Nugget, without jailbreak.

## Primary Links
- Website: https://john-0x01.github.io/nugget-wallpaper/
- Wallpaper Library: https://wallpaper.nugget.host
- Nugget GitHub Repository: https://github.com/leminlimez/Nugget

## Supported Languages
- Chinese (Simplified)
- English
- Vietnamese
- Japanese
- Korean
- Thai

## Content Summary
- Explains how to use Nugget to import animated wallpapers to Apple devices.
- Highlights no-jailbreak workflow.
- Includes feature overview, quick steps, and FAQ.

## Crawl Targets
- /
- /en/
- /vi/
- /ja/
- /ko/
- /th/

## Notes
- This site is an informational page and is not affiliated with Apple Inc.
